data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6E63: Oh? Did you want to make some {POKEBLOCK}S\nwith this old-timer?
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6ED0: Do you know how to make a {POKEBLOCK}?
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6EF1: Let's get started, then!\pLet's BERRY BLENDER!
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6F1F: Okay, a little explanation, then.\pOh, don't worry, it's quite simple.\pWhen the BLENDER's arrow comes to\nyour marker, just press the A Button.\pThat's all you have to do.\nYou'll see how easy it is when you try.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6FF0: Oh?\nYou don't have any BERRIES?\pIf you don't have any BERRIES,\nyou can't make any {POKEBLOCK}S.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B704A: Well, that won't do at all now, will it?\pIf you don't mind leftovers, you can\nhave one of my BERRIES.\pThat way, we could make some {POKEBLOCK}S\ntogether using the BERRY BLENDER.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B70F6: If I had some BERRIES left over,\nI'd gladly give you one...\pBut, I don't have any to spare today.\nWe'll have to do this another time.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B717C: But your {POKEBLOCK} CASE is full.\pYou should use some {POKEBLOCK}S before\nyou come see me again.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B71D2: But you don't have a {POKEBLOCK} CASE.\pYou should get a {POKEBLOCK} CASE and then\ncome see me.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1B7241: I wonder what kind of {POKEBLOCK} I'll get?\nThis is so exciting!
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B727C: {POKEBLOCK}S will be made with your friends \nfrom BERRIES in the BERRY BLENDER.\pIs it okay to save the game before\nlinking with your friends?
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B7304: Searching for your friends...\n... ... B Button: Cancel
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B7381: You have no BERRIES.\nThe BERRY BLENDER can't be used.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B73B7: Your {POKEBLOCK} CASE is full.\nThe BERRY BLENDER can't be used.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B73F1: You don't have a {POKEBLOCK} CASE.\nThe BERRY BLENDER can't be used.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B742F: I love making {POKEBLOCK}S.\pI always have some BERRIES with me.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B7469: If you'd like, we could make some\n{POKEBLOCK}S together using the\lBERRY BLENDER.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B74B4: Oh?\nYou don't have any BERRIES?\pWell, that won't do at all now, will it?\pIf you don't mind leftovers, you can\nhave one of my BERRIES.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B753A: We'll use it to make {POKEBLOCK}S together\nusing the BERRY BLENDER.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B7578:
Oh?
You don't have any BERRIES?\pIf I had some left over, I'd gladly
give you one...\pBut, I don't have any to spare today.
Sorry about that.
